The snake coils gracefully around her shoulders and torso, blending seamlessly into her body. The composition uses soft transparency effects and layered exposures, with a smooth gradient background transitioning from cool blue and violet tones on one side to warm orange and gold on the other. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, ethereal atmosphere, luxury fashion editorial style, sharp focus, 8k resolution.

images.alt: A high-fashion editorial portrait of a glamorous woman embodying "glaze blaze contour couture fabulous" — she stands confidently in a dramatic split-element environment: one side engulfed in glowing fire and molten textures, the other side surrounded by icy crystalline structures and cool mist. She wears an avant-garde couture gown that merges both elements: one half shimmering with fiery sequins and ember-like textures, the other half sparkling with icy silver crystals and glass-like reflections. Her makeup is bold and contoured, with glossy glowing skin ("glaze"), dramatic cheekbone highlights, and smoldering eyeshadow. She poses elegantly with strong posture, exuding confidence and luxury. Lighting is cinematic with high contrast between warm orange flames and cool blue ice, ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic, 8K fashion photography, Vogue editorial style, sharp focus, rich textures, depth of field.

embed.alt: Create a 15-second cinematic action trailer for a movie titled “NO PURCHASE NECESSARY” where an ordinary guy accidentally wins a shady sweepstakes, only to discover the prize is actually a deadly invitation into an underground corporate death game. Fast-paced quick cuts: a bright cheerful TV commercial voice announces “No purchase necessary!” while the hero stares at a golden ticket in disbelief, then smash cut to masked mercenaries kicking in his apartment door, a frantic car chase through neon city streets, bullets ripping through vending machines. A mysterious woman shouts “You weren’t supposed to win!” and the hero yells “I JUST FILLED OUT A FORM!”
